summary: Full sitewide regression on all 6 routes after the latest batch (navbar Services dropdown, footer Router Links, global WhatsApp FAB, phone 9769005504, em-dash removal, copy '‘over two decades’', BookingModal preselect, EXPLORE button removal). 14/14 review checkpoints PASS. Only finding is one dev-only React hydration warning on /global-access caused by the editor instrumentation injecting <span> children inside <option> elements of PackagesCarousel CurrencyPicker — the source code itself is correct, and it will not appear in the Netlify production build.

issues: Tiny 4px horizontal overflow (scrollbar artefact, not perceptible). All other 5 pages and other viewports clean.

action_items: (LOW) Investigate React dev-warning on /global-access: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Stems from editor source instrumentation wrapping the {c.flag} {c.code} children of <option> in PackagesCarousel.jsx (CurrencyPicker, line ~216). Production build should strip this, but consider rendering currency option label as a flat string template literal `${c.flag} ${c.code}` to guarantee no nested <span>.
(LOW) Trim ~4px horizontal overflow on Landing at exactly 768x1024 (likely a section using vw or a wide image). Not user-perceptible but worth a clean pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar.jsx and Footer.jsx are clean: SERVICE_ROUTES + NAV_LINKS data structures cleanly separate routes vs anchors and submenu items. The cross-route anchor fallback (navigate(`/${href}`)) on the Navbar resolves iteration_2's reported bug.

WhatsappFab.jsx uses an inline SVG glyph (not Lucide MessageCircle) as required. z-50 + fixed bottom-right + ping animation are correct. href correctly points to wa.me/919769005504 with a pre-filled URL-encoded message.
BookingModal.jsx defaultService prop properly threads through to <select defaultValue={defaultService}>, and each service page passes its own service label. Verified all 4 preselect correctly.

PackagesCarousel CurrencyPicker: dev hydration warning suggests the <option> children are being instrumented into <span> wrappers by the source-instrumentation system. Safer to compose the label as a single string to avoid any child element risk.

RestorationGallery (Implants Raw Truth) uses rg-tab-implants/crowns/fillings testids (not the 'raw-tab-*' naming hinted in the review). 3 carousel cards render per tab. Naming inconsistency — not a bug, but worth aligning if QA scripts hard-code raw-tab-*.

success_rate.frontend: ≈100% (14/14 review checkpoints pass; 1 dev-only hydration warning)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified PASS across the entire batch: (a) 6 routes load with testids [cosmetic-care-page, implants-restoration-page, corrective-alignment-page, neuromuscular-page, global-access-page] and 0 console errors except 1 hydration warn on /global-access. (b) [data-testid=whatsapp-fab] present on every route, has <svg> child (custom WhatsApp glyph), href=https://wa.me/919769005504?text=..., bottom-right z-50. (c) Every tel: link is tel:+919769005504 displayed as '+91 97690 05504' on Landing/footer/navbar + Cosmetic/Implants/Alignment/Neuromuscular/GlobalAccess contact sections + BookingModal (BookingModal doesn't itself contain a tel link but inherits via parent contact sections). (d) Navbar Services hover-dropdown shows [data-testid=nav-services-dropdown] with 4 items nav-services-cosmetic-aesthetic-care, nav-services-implants-restoration, nav-services-corrective-alignment, nav-services-neuromuscular-dentistry; clicking navigates via Router. (e) Mobile menu (390px) opens nav-mobile-panel with SERVICES eyebrow and all 4 nested service Links. (f) nav-link-global-access works from / and from any sub-page; active orange highlight on /global-access. (g) Cross-route anchor: clicking nav-link-about from /global-access navigates to /#about (iteration_2 bug now fixed). (h) Footer has 4 footer-service-* with hrefs ending /cosmetic-aesthetic-care, /implants-restoration, /corrective-alignment, /neuromuscular-dentistry; footer-link-global-access -> /global-access. (i) No em-dash (U+2014) anywhere across all 6 pages — document.body.innerText.includes('—') returns false. (j) Landing About contains 'over two decades' (no 'over a decade'); Global Access About contains 'two decades moving between New York and Mumbai'. (k) Landing renders 4 service-card-0..3, 0 service-link-* (EXPLORE buttons removed); service-card-0 click navigates to /cosmetic-aesthetic-care. (l) BookingModal preselect: Cosmetic→'Cosmetic & Aesthetic Care', Implants→'Implants & Restoration', Alignment→'Corrective Alignment', Neuromuscular→'Neuromuscular Dentistry'. (m) Implants Raw Truth: 3 tabs (Dental Implants, Dental Crowns, Fillings) with testids rg-tab-implants/crowns/fillings and rg-implants-carousel + rg-card-implants-0..2. Corrective Alignment Raw Truth: 1 ag-card-aligners-0 centered. Neuromuscular: 10 nm-symptom-0..9 buttons; click toggles aria-pressed false→true and inner label receives line-through class. (n) Global Access: 8 package cards, packages-currency-select defaults to USD; switching to EUR updates prices to '€55' (verified). (o) No horizontal scroll at 1920×800, 1280×800, 390×844; 4px scrollbar artefact on Landing at 768×1024 only. Iteration_2 issues all fixed.
rca of the issue: (Hydration warning on /global-access) The editor's source-mapping instrumentation injects a wrapper <span data-ve-dynamic=true> around dynamic text expressions. When the expression is the child of <option> (PackagesCarousel.jsx line 216: <option>{c.flag} {c.code}</option>), React rejects <span> inside <option> per HTML spec. This is dev-only — production builds strip the instrumentation. Mitigation: change to <option>{`${c.flag} ${c.code}`}</option> so it renders as a single text node.
